name: ConnectWise Manage
description: ConnectWise PSA for service management and ticketing

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to your ConnectWise Manage instance
2. Navigate to System > Members > API Members
3. Create or select an API member
4. Generate API keys (public + private)
5. Get your Client ID from developer.connectwise.com
6. Your Company ID is shown in the login screen

credentialFields.label: ConnectWise Site URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your ConnectWise Manage site URL (e.g., https://na.myconnectwise.net or https://api-na.myconnectwise.net)

credentialFields.label: Public Key
credentialFields.helpText: API member public key from ConnectWise

credentialFields.label: Private Key
credentialFields.helpText: API member private key from ConnectWise

checks.name: Incident Response
checks.description: Verify service tickets and boards exist for incident tracking

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: List members and users to verify access management
